title: Remote Compliance Audit Tools Review: AuditBoard vs Workiva vs Diligent Comprehensive Comparison | 2026 Review
description: Remote compliance audit challenges in process audit tracking. Comprehensive review of AuditBoard, Workiva, and Diligent compliance audit platforms. Compare.
content:
Remote Compliance Audit Tools: AuditBoard vs Workiva vs Diligent Comprehensive Comparison

Overview

Compliance audit tools are essential for remote teams managing regulatory requirements, conducting internal audits, and maintaining audit trails across distributed workforces. This comprehensive review compares three leading compliance audit platforms: AuditBoard, Workiva, and Diligent, analyzing their features, pricing, and suitability for remote team compliance management.

AuditBoard: Modern Audit Management Platform

AuditBoard has become the leading audit management platform, offering intuitive tools for SOX, operational, and IT audits with collaborative workflows.

Key Features

  • Audit Management: Centralized audit planning, execution, and reporting
  • SOX Compliance: Automated SOX testing and documentation
  • Operational Audit: Workflow templates for operational audits
  • IT Audit: IT controls testing and cybersecurity assessment
  • Issue Tracking: Remediation workflow with deadline tracking
  • Analytics: Risk heatmaps, dashboards, and trend analysis
  • Collaboration: Real-time editing, comments, and notifications

Pricing

  • Team: Starting around $500/month - core audit features
  • Business: Custom pricing - advanced SOX, IT audit modules
  • Enterprise: Custom pricing - full platform, dedicated support

Best For

Teams conducting SOX compliance and operational audits. Ideal for internal audit departments, finance teams, and organizations requiring intuitive audit workflows.

Workiva: Integrated Reporting Platform

Workiva specializes in integrated reporting for SEC filings, sustainability reports, and enterprise risk management with real-time collaboration.

Key Features

  • SEC Reporting: 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K automated document generation
  • ESG Reporting: Sustainability report creation and management
  • Risk Management: Enterprise risk registry and assessment
  • XBRL Tagging: Automated XBRL tagging for regulatory filings
  • Document Control: Version history, approvals, and audit trail
  • Collaboration: Multiple users editing documents simultaneously
  • Integration: Connects to ERP, general ledger, and data sources

Pricing

  • Platform Fee: Custom pricing based on modules and users
  • SEC Reporting: Starting around $25,000/year
  • ESG Module: Additional cost for sustainability reporting
  • Risk Module: Additional cost for enterprise risk management

Best For

Teams requiring SEC regulatory filings and integrated reporting. Ideal for public companies, finance departments, and organizations managing complex regulatory reporting requirements.

Diligent: Governance and Compliance Platform

Diligent offers a comprehensive governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) platform with board management, compliance tracking, and audit capabilities.

Key Features

  • Board Management: Board meeting materials, voting, and collaboration
  • Entity Management: Corporate entity tracking and compliance calendars
  • Risk Management: Risk register, heat maps, and assessment workflows
  • Compliance Tracking: Regulatory deadline management and notifications
  • Audit Trail: Complete documentation for compliance verification
  • Diligents: AI-powered compliance insights and recommendations
  • Integration: Connects with board portals, ERP systems

Pricing

  • Board: Custom pricing - board meeting management
  • Entity: Custom pricing - entity management module
  • Risk: Custom pricing - enterprise risk management
  • Full GRC Suite: Custom pricing for complete platform

Best For

Teams requiring governance and board management alongside compliance. Ideal for corporate governance teams, board administrators, and organizations needing comprehensive GRC solutions.

Comparison Summary

FeatureAuditBoardWorkivaDiligent
SOX ComplianceExcellentGoodGood
SEC FilingsNoExcellentNo
Board ManagementNoNoExcellent
Risk ManagementGoodExcellentExcellent
Starting Price~$500/month~$25,000/yearCustom
Best Use CaseInternal auditSEC reportingBoard governance
CollaborationExcellentExcellentGood

Selection Recommendations

Choose AuditBoard if:

  • Internal audit and SOX compliance are primary requirements
  • You need intuitive audit workflow automation
  • Your team conducts operational and IT audits regularly

Choose Workiva if:

  • SEC regulatory filings (10-K, 10-Q) are essential
  • You need integrated reporting with XBRL automation
  • ESG/sustainability reporting is part of your compliance program

Choose Diligent if:

  • Board governance and meeting management are priorities
  • You need comprehensive entity management for multiple corporations
  • GRC (Governance, Risk, Compliance) integration is required

Key Takeaways

When selecting remote compliance audit tools:

  1. Define compliance scope: AuditBoard for audits, Workiva for SEC, Diligent for governance
  2. Consider collaboration needs: All three offer remote team collaboration
  3. Evaluate reporting requirements: Workiva excels for regulatory filings
  4. Assess board involvement: Diligent uniquely offers board management
  5. Plan for scale: All platforms scale for enterprise needs
author: Corporate Audit Expert

mainEntity.name: What are the best remote compliance audit tools for remote work and distributed teams in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Top compliance audit tools include industry-leading platforms offering features like policy enforcement, audit trail generation, regulatory tracking, risk assessment, compliance dashboards, automated reporting for remote work and distributed teams.

mainEntity.name: How much do remote compliance audit tools typically cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: remote compliance audit tools pricing ranges from $10-50 per user/month for basic tools to $100-300 per user/month for enterprise solutions, depending on features, users, and business scale.

mainEntity.name: What key features should I look for in remote compliance audit tools?

acceptedAnswer.text: Essential features include policy enforcement, audit trail generation, regulatory tracking, risk assessment, compliance dashboards, automated reporting, plus integration capabilities, mobile accessibility, reporting dashboards, and reliable customer support.

mainEntity.name: Can remote compliance audit tools integrate with existing business systems?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, modern remote compliance audit tools offer API integrations with popular platforms, CRM systems, payment gateways, and third-party applications for seamless workflow automation.

mainEntity.name: How do remote compliance audit tools help improve operational efficiency?

acceptedAnswer.text: remote compliance audit tools reduce manual tasks by 40-60%, provide real-time insights, automate routine processes, and enable better decision-making through comprehensive analytics.

mainEntity.name: What's the implementation timeline for remote compliance audit tools?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most remote compliance audit tools can be deployed within 1-4 weeks, including setup, data migration, team training, and testing phases. Complex implementations may require 2-3 months.

howto_schema.name: How to Choose and Implement remote compliance audit tools
howto_schema.description: Step-by-step guide for selecting and deploying the best remote compliance audit tools for remote-tools

step.name: Assess Your Business Requirements
step.text: Evaluate your current operational challenges, team size, budget constraints, and specific needs for remote compliance audit tools to establish clear selection criteria.

step.name: Research and Compare Options
step.text: Research 3-5 remote compliance audit tools platforms, comparing features, pricing structures, user reviews, integration capabilities, and industry-specific functionality.

step.name: Request Demos and Free Trials
step.text: Schedule demos with top vendors and initiate free trials to test usability, performance, and compatibility with your existing workflows and team preferences.

step.name: Evaluate Total Cost and ROI
step.text: Calculate total implementation costs including subscription fees, setup costs, training time, and potential productivity gains to determine ROI for remote compliance audit tools.

step.name: Deploy and Train Your Team
step.text: Implement your chosen remote compliance audit tools, migrate existing data, conduct comprehensive team training, and establish ongoing support procedures for successful adoption.
